# Nucla

Nucla is a platform connecting startup founders with project team members, freelancers, and co-founders.

## Main Pages
- [Feed Page](https://founders.astanahub.dev/) - Browse and filter open projects, search by role, category, city, and project stage.
- [Project Page](https://founders.astanahub.dev/project/:id) - View project details, roadmap, open roles, and comments.
- [New Project](https://founders.astanahub.dev/new) - Interface to create a new project.
- [Dashboard](https://founders.astanahub.dev/dashboard) - Manage owned projects and applications.
- [Profile](https://founders.astanahub.dev/profile) - User settings, skills, and bio.
- [Messages](https://founders.astanahub.dev/messages) - Chat with other platform users.
